nodes.label: RequestForQuotation
nodes.description: The request for quotation represents the data structure to configure a manufacturing request and send this to a supplier receive a quotation

nodes.label: rfqIdentification
nodes.description: all properties necessary for identification of the request for quotation

nodes.label: rfqConfiguration
nodes.description: all information to configure a request for quotation

nodes.label: rfqSender
nodes.description: all data about sender of request for quotation, important for offer and delivery

nodes.label: cxHeader
nodes.description: header information by Catena-X

nodes.label: source
nodes.description: digital address of the sender (e.g.token, IP address, link, user account)

nodes.label: id
nodes.description: internal identifier in user account

nodes.label: name
nodes.description: name for the request for user account management (usually name of the part to be manufactured)

nodes.label: dateTime
nodes.description: date and time of the request in user account

nodes.label: cadFile
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: CAD file as geometry definition, e.g. step file

nodes.label: cadFileType
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: CAD file format

nodes.label: parts
nodes.description: list of parts contained in the CAD file, to be defined in RFQ configuration

nodes.label: billOfMaterial
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: reference to the single level bill of material as built

nodes.label: firstDeliveryDate
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: Date of desired, first, but not must delivery

nodes.label: lastDeliveryDate
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: date of required and last acceptable delivery

nodes.label: additionalComments
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: placeholder for any kind of additional comments

nodes.label: additionalFiles
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: in case there are additional documents or files to share

nodes.label: senderName
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: name of the sender

nodes.label: senderAddress
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: BPDM/ or fill in by the customer, address of sender

nodes.label: senderCompanyName
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: BPDM/ or fill in by the customer, company name of sender

nodes.label: senderEMail
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: BPDM/ or fill in by the customer, e-mail address of sender

nodes.label: senderPhoneNumber
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: BPDM/ or fill in by the customer, phone number of sender

nodes.label: senderAccountAddress
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: BPDM/ or fill in by the customer, address of sender for account

nodes.label: senderDeliveryAddress
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: BPDM/ or fill in by the customer, address of sender for delivery

nodes.label: deliveryRequirements
nodes.description: RFQ-Sender: filled by customer, any kind of delivery requirements

nodes.label: senderBpn
nodes.description: CX-Header: BPN identification of sender partner

nodes.label: recipientBpn
nodes.description: CX-Header: BPN identification of recipient partner

nodes.label: context
nodes.description: CX-Header: description of use case context

nodes.label: messageId
nodes.description: CX-Header: identifier used by RFQ protocol

nodes.label: sentDateTime
nodes.description: CX-Header: time stamp, when message is sent. The value MUST be formatted according to the ISO 8601 standard.

nodes.label: version
nodes.description: CX-Header: version of RFQ data structure

nodes.label: partId
nodes.description: identifier of the part from CAD File

nodes.label: partName
nodes.description: name of the part in CAD file. In case the CAD file has only one part, this could also be the file name.

nodes.label: manufacturingDomain
nodes.description: domain of required process (e.g. subtractive manufacturing, additive manufacturing, assembly)

nodes.label: manufacturingMethod
nodes.description: manufacturing method depending on the domain (e.g. milling, powder bed fusion, welding,?)

nodes.label: billOfProcess
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: list of processes to manufacture the part(s)

nodes.label: postProcesses
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: after manufacturing typically post processes are necessary, depending on the manufacturing method

nodes.label: generalTolerance
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: selection of defined tolerance classes

nodes.label: additionalQualityRequirements
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: specific requirements to guarantee quality

nodes.label: testPartRequired
nodes.description: RFQ-Configuration: check if a test part is required, makes only sens for batches

nodes.label: quantity
nodes.description: Quantity of which the child item is assembled into the parent item. In general it is '1' for serialized parts.

nodes.label: material
nodes.description: material definition with further information

nodes.label: childItems
nodes.description: Set of child items, of which the given parent item is assembled by (one structural level down).

nodes.label: catenaXId
nodes.description: The Catena-X ID of the given part (e.g. the assembly), valid for the Catena-X dataspace.

nodes.label: postProcessGroup
nodes.description: process group is depending on the defined manufacturing method and defines the general treatment

nodes.label: postProcessType
nodes.description: specific process out of the process group

nodes.label: postProcessProperty
nodes.description: additional property based on the post process type

nodes.label: quantityNumber
nodes.description: The number of objects related to the measurement unit

nodes.label: measurementUnit
nodes.description: Unit of Measurement for the quantity of serialized objects

nodes.label: materialItems
nodes.description: material definition with additional detail elements (name, density, chemical name,...)

nodes.label: materialGroup
nodes.description: definition of material group for pre-selection

nodes.label: createdOn
nodes.description: Timestamp when the relation between the parent item and the child item was created, e.g. when the serialized child part was assembled into the given part.

nodes.label: lastModifiedOn
nodes.description: Timestamp when the assembly relationship between parent item and child item was last modified.

nodes.label: businessPartner
nodes.description: The supplier of the given child item.

nodes.label: value
nodes.description: value to detail the part material item

nodes.label: type
nodes.description: value type to detail the part material item

nodes.label: RFQIdentificationCharacteristic
nodes.description: all properties necessary for identification of the request for quotation

nodes.label: RFQConfigurationCharacteristic
nodes.description: all information to configure a request for quotation

nodes.label: RFQSenderCharacteristic
nodes.description: all data about sender of request for quotation, important for offer and delivery

nodes.label: CXHeaderCharacteristic
nodes.description: header information by Catena-X

nodes.label: SourceCharacteristic
nodes.description: digital address of the sender (e.g.token, IP address, link, user account)

nodes.label: IdCharacteristic
nodes.description: internal identifier in user account

nodes.label: NameCharacteristic
nodes.description: name for the request for user account management (usually name of the part to be manufactured)

nodes.label: DateTimeCharacteristic
nodes.description: date and time of the request in user account

nodes.label: FileCharacteristic
nodes.description: CAD file as geometry definition, e.g. step file

nodes.label: CADFileTypeCharacteristic
nodes.description: CAD file format

nodes.label: SetOfPartsCharacteristic
nodes.description: list of parts contained in the CAD file, to be defined in RFQ configuration

nodes.label: BillOfMaterialCharacteristic
nodes.description: reference to the single level bill of material as built

nodes.label: DeliveryDateCharacteristic
nodes.description: delivery date

nodes.label: CommentCharacteristic
nodes.description: placeholder for any kind of additional comments

nodes.label: SetOfFilesCharacteristic
nodes.description: in case there are additional documents or files to share

nodes.label: SenderNameCharacteristic
nodes.description: name of the sender

nodes.label: SenderAddressCharacteristic
nodes.description: address of sender

nodes.label: SenderCompanyNameCharacteristic
nodes.description: company name of sender

nodes.label: SenderEMailCharacteristic
nodes.description: e-mail address of sender

nodes.label: SenderPhoneNumberCharacteristic
nodes.description: phone number of sender

nodes.label: SenderAccountAddressCharacteristic
nodes.description: address of sender for account

nodes.label: SenderDeliveryAddressCharacteristic
nodes.description: address of sender for delivery

nodes.label: DeliveryRequirementsCharacteristic
nodes.description: any kind of delivery requirements

nodes.label: ContextCharacteristic
nodes.description: description of use case context

nodes.label: TimeStamp
nodes.description: time stamp, when message is sent

nodes.label: VersionCharacteristic
nodes.description: version of RFQ data structure

nodes.label: PartIdCharacteristic
nodes.description: identifier of the part from CAD File

nodes.label: PartNameCharacteristic
nodes.description: name of the part in CAD file. In case the CAD file has only one part, this could also be the file name

nodes.label: ManufacturingDomainCharacteristic
nodes.description: domain of required process (e.g. subtractive manufacturing, additive manufacturing, assembly)

nodes.label: ManufacturingMethodCharacteristic
nodes.description: manufacturing method depending on the domain (e.g. milling, powder bed fusion, welding,?)

nodes.label: BillOfProcessCharacteristic
nodes.description: list of processes to manufacture the part(s)

nodes.label: SetOfPostProcessCharacteristic
nodes.description: after manufacturing typically post processes are necessary, depending on the manufacturing method

nodes.label: GeneralToleranceCharacteristic
nodes.description: selection of defined tolerance classes

nodes.label: AdditionalQualityRequirementsCharacteristic
nodes.description: specific requirements to guarantee quality

nodes.label: TestPartRequiredCharacteristic
nodes.description: check if a test part is required, makes only sens for batches

nodes.label: MaterialCharacteristic
nodes.description: material definition with further information

nodes.label: PostProcessGroupCharacteristic
nodes.description: process group is depending on the defined manufacturing method and defines the general treatment

nodes.label: PostProcessTypeCharacteristic
nodes.description: specific process out of the process group

nodes.label: PostProcessPropertyCharacteristic
nodes.description: additional property based on the post process type

nodes.label: NumberOfObjects
nodes.description: Quantifiable number of objects in reference to the measurementUnit

nodes.label: SetMaterialItemsCharacteristic
nodes.description: set of elements to detail material items

nodes.label: PartMaterialGroupCharacteristic
nodes.description: definition of material group for pre-selection

nodes.label: ValueCharacteristic
nodes.description: value to detail the part material item

nodes.label: TypeCharacteristic
nodes.description: value type to detail the part material item

nodes.label: RFQIdentificationData
nodes.description: all properties necessary for identification of the request for quotation

nodes.label: RFQConfigurationData
nodes.description: all information to configure a request for quotation

nodes.label: RFQSenderData
nodes.description: all data about sender of request for quotation, important for offer and delivery

nodes.label: CXHeaderData
nodes.description: header information by Catena-X

nodes.label: File
nodes.description: file document

nodes.label: PartObject
nodes.description: part contained in the CAD file, to be defined in RFQ configuration

nodes.label: SingleLevelBomAsBuiltReference
nodes.preferredName: Single Level Bill of Material as Built reference
nodes.description: The single-level bill of material represents one sub-level of an assembly and does not include any lower-level subassemblies. The as-built lifecycle references all child items as manufactured by the manufacturer referencing only child items in an as built lifecycle themselves, e.g. serial parts or batches.

nodes.label: BillOfProcessReference
nodes.description: reference to the bill of process model

nodes.label: PostProcessData
nodes.description: after manufacturing typically post processes are necessary, depending on the manufacturing method

nodes.label: Quantity
nodes.description: Comprises the number of objects and the unit of measurement for the respective child objects

nodes.label: MaterialData
nodes.description: object with all information about material of a part to be manufactured

nodes.label: ChildData
nodes.description: Catena-X ID and meta data of the assembled child item.

nodes.label: MaterialItem
nodes.description: the material item is a detailed element to describe the material and has a value and a type, like value=2.7, type=density g/m3 or value=AlMgMn, type=chemical

nodes.label: QuantityCharacteristic
nodes.description: Describes the quantity in which the child item is assembled in the given parent item by providing a quantity value and the measurement unit in which the quantity is measured.

nodes.label: SetOfChildItemsCharacteristic
nodes.description: Set of child items the parent item is assembled by (one structural level down).
